summary: High‑rating mobile copy that reviewers say is almost as good as the famed Miller soundboard source.
review: The lone review is brief but enthusiastic, awarding five stars and noting that this mobile recording approaches the quality of the well‑regarded Miller SBD. No specific comments about the musical performance are provided, so the assessment focuses on the perceived strong audio fidelity for a non‑soundboard capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one short review; it gives a 5‑star rating and compares favorably to a top soundboard source, suggesting high perceived quality despite lack of detailed information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mobile copy praised as almost as good as the Miller SBD; implies clear and usable audio for a non‑soundboard source.
